name: emergency_services_licensing_backlog_forces_mesa_lib_eq
premise: A whistleblower submission and a customer complaint surfaced the same underlying issue through different evidence chains. In Emergency Services, the situation tagged internally around emergency services licensing backlog forces mesa lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Southport corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Jonah Kim
agents.identity: I am Jonah Kim, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Emergency Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Inez Mensah
agents.identity: I am Inez Mensah, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Emergency Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on equality.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on equality for immediate traction on liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Jonah Kim must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Jonah Kim do?
